Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major distributor with 169-day overdue invoice #4460; establish strict 35-day terms with prepayment requirement for new orders.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Retail chain with recent 14-day overdue balance; tighten from baseline to 30 days with weekly aging review.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer with 60-day overdue invoice #5151; reduce DSO to 28 days and require POD confirmation before shipment.

Own Channels (Espoo Shop, Online, Bars).reason: Protect 3-5 day payment cycle; prioritize fulfillment and enforce payment-on-delivery for these highest-priority channels.

alerts.message: IMMEDIATE: Invoice #4460 (€18,484) is 170 days overdue since 2025-10-30. Escalate to executive level, cease shipments, and demand immediate payment or formal payment plan within 48 hours. Risk of write-off requires CFO review.

CASH CRISIS RISK: Fixed costs (€62,781/month) + overdue exposure (€76,333) exceed current open AR velocity. With April revenue at €201,863 and 6-8 week export DSO, April cash inflow is critically insufficient. Suspend non-critical OpEx and activate emergency credit facility THIS WEEK.
Invoice #5151 (€9,558) is 60 days overdue since 2026-02-16. Contact customer by phone today for committed payment date; if not received by 2026-04-24, place on COD terms.
Invoice #3837 (€5,882) is 287 days overdue since 2025-07-05. Classify as doubtful debt (€5.9K reserve), pursue legal collections, or write off if customer is defunct.

Overdue inventory concentration: 43 invoices overdue across €76,333. April new sales (€57,648/month run rate) cover only ~75% of fixed costs. Implement daily AR dashboard and escalate collections on invoices due 15+ days.
Invoice #14 (€4,540) is 976 days overdue since 2024-08-14. Write off or escalate to third-party collections; this is a dead asset.
Peak revenue window (August €282K) arrives 6-8 weeks later in Oct–Nov. Secure bridge financing NOW to cover Apr–Jul cash gap; Bemböle contract ends Sept 2026 (€25K/mo cliff).

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €76K overdue + €62.8K fixed costs = cash deficit risk this week unless €40K+ in collections materialize; export DSO lag means April revenue won't clear until late May–early June.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy Keskusvarasto (€18.5K, 170 days overdue) TODAY and demand €10K interim payment by 2026-04-20 or cease all shipments effective 2026-04-18; escalate to CEO if necessary.
pattern_insights: Export customers (B.V., GmbH, AG, SLU, PTE) dominate overdue mix (€29.4K of €76.3K = 38.5%); implement COD/LC for all non-EU export orders effective 2026-04-20.

114 open invoices with only 50 sales orders in last 30 days suggests weak sales momentum (€57.6K ≈ 28% of Apr budget) and aging backlog; prioritize collections velocity over new sales to stabilize cash.
insights.wc_note: 62% YoY growth is consuming cash; €79.9K open POs + 6-8 week export DSO + €76.3K overdue creates a dangerous working capital trap—collections must accelerate to 25-day average DSO (vs. current ~45 days) to fund growth without external capital.
